General.Name: Goldenstone Acquisition Ltd
General.Description: Goldenstone Acquisition Limited does not have significant operations. It intends to enter into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses, or entities. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Aurora, Illinois.
